front: What is DPP-4 and its role in incretin peptide degradation?
back: Dipeptidyl peptidase-4 (DPP-4) cleaves GLP-1 and GIP (incretin peptides) at the N-terminus, inactivating them. DPP-4 inhibitors (sitagliptin, vildagliptin) prolong incretin action, enhancing glucose-dependent insulin secretion. Used in type 2 diabetes treatment.
